items.phrase: I went to the library to study.
items.translation: Я пошёл в библиотеку, чтобы заниматься.
items.example: I went to the library to study for my final exams.

items.phrase: I was tired so I went to bed.
items.example: I was tired so I went to bed early.

items.phrase: I was late because I missed the bus.
items.translation: Я опоздал, потому что пропустил автобус.
items.example: I was late because I missed the bus this morning.

items.phrase: We stayed inside because of the rain.
items.example: We stayed inside because of the heavy rain.

items.phrase: She called him to invite him to the party.
items.translation: Она позвонила ему, чтобы пригласить на вечеринку.
items.example: She called him to invite him to the party.

items.phrase: I set an alarm so that I wouldn't oversleep.
items.translation: Я поставил будильник, чтобы не проспать.
items.example: I set an alarm so that I wouldn't oversleep.

items.phrase: He studied hard because he wanted to pass.
items.translation: Он много занимался, потому что хотел сдать.
items.example: He studied hard because he wanted to pass the exam.

items.phrase: There was a traffic jam so we missed the flight.
items.translation: Была пробка, поэтому мы опоздали на рейс.
items.example: There was a traffic jam so we missed the flight.
